memberdef.argsstring: (struct rtio *r, struct rtio_iodev *iodev, const struct i3c_msg *msgs, uint8_t num_msgs)
memberdef.name: i3c_rtio_copy

briefdescription.para: Copy an array of i3c_msgs to rtio submissions and a transaction.

parameterdescription.para: Last sqe setup in the copy
Not enough memory to copy the transaction

briefdescription.para: Signal that the current (ctx->txn_curr) submission has been completed.

parameterdescription.para: Completion status, negative values are errors
Next submission is ready to start
No more submissions to work on

briefdescription.para: Submit, atomically, a submission to work on at some point.

parameterdescription.para: Next submission is ready to start
No new submission to start or submissions are in progress already

detaileddescription.para: Provides a compatible API for the existing i3c_configure API, and blocks the caller until the transfer completes.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct i3c_rtio *ctx, struct i3c_msg *msgs, uint8_t num_msgs, struct i3c_device_desc *desc)
memberdef.name: i3c_rtio_transfer

briefdescription.para: Transfer i3c messages in a blocking call.

detaileddescription.para: Provides a compatible API for the existing i3c_transfer API, and blocks the caller until the transfer completes.

briefdescription.para: Perform an I3C bus recovery in a blocking call.

detaileddescription.para: Provides a compatible API for the existing i3c_recover API, and blocks the caller until the process completes.

briefdescription.para: Perform an I3C CCC in a blocking call.

detaileddescription.para: Provides a compatible API for the existing i3c_do_ccc API, and blocks the caller until the process completes.
